clusters.headline: Ethiopia: Ruling Party in Ethiopia Secures 90% of Seats in Parliament

clusters.headline: Cape Verde fan goes wild live on BBC News as his country scores
clusters.summary: During a live BBC News broadcast, reporter Paul Njie interviews a Cape Verde fan when the country suddenly scores its first ever World Cup goal against Uruguay in the 2026 World Cup.

clusters.headline: Zimbabwe: Zimbabwean Economy Doing Very Well, Capable of Absorbing All Citizens Being Chased Out of South Africa - Says Mutsvangwa
clusters.summary: [New Zimbabwe] THE Zimbabwean economy is doing very well and now able to absorb all its citizens who are being hounded out of South Africa for being there illegally, Zanu PF spokesperson Christopher Mutsvangwa has said.

clusters.headline: Singapore to take 'more flexible approach' to dialect films, open to more Teochew screenings of Dear You
clusters.summary: “We remain open to facilitating and supporting further Teochew screenings should the distributor wish to apply for them, in response to audience interest,” said the Ministry of Digital Development and Information.

clusters.headline: Congo-Kinshasa: DR Congo Announces Free Healthcare for All Illnesses in Ituri As Ebola Gains Ground
clusters.summary: [RFI] The government of the Democratic Republic of Congo has announced the introduction of free healthcare for all diseases in Ituri - a pilot project that authorities hope to extend nationwide. This comes as the country struggles to contain an Ebola outbreak, with confirmed cases now at over 1,000.
